/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/fapi_to_mac_error_indication_fastpath_translator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/fapi_to_mac_indications_fastpath_translator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.dir/fapi_to_mac_slot_indication_fastpath_translator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_fapi_to_mac_p7_fastpath_translator.a
